rounds.evidence: sched.begin(rt, -5) succeeded with turn=-5 in event — violates R67 spec (replay_frame.ts schema turn: z.number().int().nonnegative())
rounds.fix: Added assertValidTurn() — throws RangeError on negative / non-integer / NaN / Infinity turn

rounds.evidence: sequence() returned mutable internal array — caller could .push() arbitrary events, corrupting subsequent reads
rounds.fix: sequence() now returns Object.freeze(ledger.slice()) — frozen snapshot

rounds.evidence: checksumFrame(NaN), Infinity, -Infinity all produced IDENTICAL hash (1babfd05786a) — adversarial payload indistinguishable
canonicalize({x: 123n}) throws 'Do not know how to serialize a BigInt' — R68 crashes if event payload contains bigint
rounds.fix: prepareForJson() pre-walks tree, converts bigint → CANON_SENTINEL_BIGINT_PREFIX sentinel

rounds.evidence: canonicalize({x: Symbol(...), y: 1}) → {y:1} — Symbol field silently dropped, state with/without indistinguishable. Same for undefined values.
obj['__proto__']='evil_payload' on Object.create(null) — Object.keys returns ['__proto__','x'] but JS sets prototype instead of own-property when reassigned, so payload was hidden in canonical output
rounds.fix: RESERVED_KEY_MAP (Map, not literal — avoids self-pollution) renames '__proto__' → CANON_KEY_PROTO. defineProperty on Object.create(null) prevents prototype-mutation.

rounds.evidence: canonicalize(circularObj) → 'Maximum call stack size exceeded' — service could be crashed via crafted payload
rounds.fix: prepareForJson tracks WeakSet of visited objects/arrays; returns CANON_SENTINEL_CIRCULAR on cycle

rounds.evidence: canonicalize({name:'café'}) ≠ canonicalize({name:'café'}) — composed (U+00E9) and decomposed (e + U+0301) forms hash differently despite identical semantics
rounds.fix: prepareForJson NFC-normalizes all string values via String.prototype.normalize('NFC')

rounds.evidence: const MAP = { __proto__: SENTINEL }: literal-syntax __proto__ sets prototype of MAP itself, so MAP['__proto__'] is undefined → rename pass broken
rounds.fix: Switched RESERVED_KEY_MAP to new Map() — bracket-access via .get() unaffected by literal pollution
rounds.regression_tests: covered by BUG-6 test which would have failed otherwise

rounds.evidence: 10,000-turn stress: 30,000 ticks in 467ms, +7MB heap. 3-run identical hash on frame containing bigint + NaN + Symbol + composed/decomposed unicode. Self-compare 30-frame stream: divergent=false.

summary: 9/9 hidden bugs found and fixed. R67 + R68 hardened against negative input, non-integer input, mutable-ledger leak, NaN/Inf collapse, bigint crash, Symbol/undefined drop, prototype-pollution, circular DoS, unicode drift. All 29 tests pass (13 new regression). Code-fix-clean rate: 100%.
